messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Serialise a BL topic's content into the repo — the Telegram topic becomes a projection, not the source of truth
What it solves: THE RESHAPED FRAMING — THIS IS THE KEY IDEA, AND IT IS STRONGER THAN "ARCHIVE BEFORE DELETE".
The human's ask is not merely "keep a copy so deleting is survivable". It is: SERIALISE the
topic's content so the topic can be RECREATED FROM SCRATCH. That inverts the architecture —
the Telegram topic st…
How it works: Every message is serialised as it happens, in both directions

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-329 - Serialise a BL topic's content into the repo — the Telegram topic becomes a projection, not the source of truth is complete.
